description_en: Course on adsorption equilibria, fixed-bed adsorber design, heterogeneous catalysis kinetics and industrial chromatography processes.
competencies: Characterize adsorbents and quantify adsorption equilibria of mixtures
Design fixed-bed adsorbers for separation processes
Identify effective reaction rates of heterogeneous catalysts
Apply transient reactor operating modes and industrial chromatography concepts

description_en: Course on generating electricity from renewable sources and integrating photovoltaics, wind, fuel cells and storage into the energy system.
competencies: Assess effects of renewable electricity on the power supply system
Evaluate photovoltaic, wind and hydropower generation potentials
Analyze fuel cells and electrical energy storage options
Understand grid integration of decentralized renewable generators

description_en: A course on analytical and numerical methods for simulating and analyzing electrical networks and magnetic circuits.
competencies: Simulate and analyze electrical networks in time and frequency domain
Apply analytical and numerical methods to magnetic circuits
Model mechanical systems as equivalent electrical networks
Simulate magnetic fields and combine network and field methods

description_en: Course on analytical and numerical methods for simulating electrical networks and electromagnetic field problems using computational tools.
competencies: Apply analytical and numerical methods to analyze electrical networks
Simulate electromagnetic field problems with finite-difference methods
Map mechanical systems onto equivalent electrical networks
Use MATLAB, Octave, Python or SPICE for system simulation

description_en: Covers selection, dimensioning and optimization of antennas using variational and perturbation methods and modal analysis.
competencies: Select and dimension antennas for specific applications
Optimize antennas using perturbation and variational calculus
Apply near-field to far-field transformation
Analyze microwave circuits using three-dimensional modal analysis

description_en: Applies advanced image processing and understanding to research topics such as 3D measurement, motion analysis, tracking and biometrics.
competencies: Design complex image processing and understanding systems
Apply algorithms for 3D measurement, motion analysis and object tracking
Implement biometric and face analysis recognition techniques
Develop image evaluation systems for current research applications

description_en: Team project realizing a microsystems-based product idea as a start-up demonstrator with market analysis, prototype, pitch and portfolio.
competencies: Coordinate and run a simplified start-up team project to a product demonstrator
Develop a microsystems-based product idea and build a prototype
Conduct market analysis and assess business-plan feasibility
Prepare a marketing pitch, project portfolio and presentation

description_en: A seminar on sensor fusion architectures and multimodal pattern recognition for human-machine interaction under uncertainty.
competencies: Describe multimodal signals and their information content
Compare early and late sensor fusion architectures
Apply Markov fusion networks for multimodal pattern recognition
Handle uncertainty in sensor fusion systems

description_en: Covers design and construction of distributed digital automation systems including component integration via IT and automation technologies.
competencies: Design distributed digital automation systems
Plan integration of automation components
Interpret abstract automation and information technology models
Apply IT and automation technologies to integrate components

description_en: Construction, operation and interconnection of automation devices, including electrical, pneumatic and hydraulic sensors and actuators.
competencies: Explain construction and operation of automation devices
Describe working principles of digital measurement and actuating devices
Explain pneumatic and hydraulic actuating devices
Apply automation devices in practical exercises
Interpret realisation forms with different signal and energy carriers

description_en: Methods and techniques of image and video coding, from signal-theoretic to semantic approaches, for compression and communication.
competencies: Explain methods and techniques of image and video coding
Assess existing coding schemes for still and moving images
Estimate the information content of images
Develop encoders for image and video compression
Apply transform and semantic coding techniques

description_en: Project building an AI-driven Rasa chatbot for an escape-room game, covering NLU model training, evaluation and UX user testing.
competencies: Build chatbot systems with the Rasa framework
Train and evaluate natural language understanding models
Collect and prepare classification training data
Conduct UX user tests and derive improvements
Manage an AI project from idea to productive deployment

description_en: Teaches the fundamentals of digital chip design from partitioning and placement to routing, verification and design for testability.
competencies: Apply the main steps of digital chip design
Create manufacturable chip layouts with industrial tools
Perform floorplanning, placement, clock tree synthesis and routing
Design for testability using BIST, boundary scan and ATPG

description_en: Covers industrial communication systems, protocols, bus systems and Ethernet/TCP/IP configuration based on the ISO/OSI reference model.
competencies: Analyze communication systems using the ISO/OSI reference model
Configure Ethernet/TCP/IP networks for industrial use
Explain operating principles of industrial bus systems and protocols
Assess security aspects of industrial communication systems
Integrate devices and controllers into communication networks

description_en: Theoretical foundations of neural network architectures and learning rules, including recurrent networks, associative memory and reinforcement learning.
competencies: Explain architectures and learning rules of neural network models
Analyse stability and asymptotic behaviour of feedforward and recurrent networks
Model associative memory and excitatory-inhibitory networks
Apply reinforcement and actor-critic learning concepts
Implement and visualise neural models in small programs

description_en: Theory and application of computed tomography, covering imaging physics and mathematical reconstruction methods with artefact correction.
competencies: Explain the physics and operation of computed tomography
Apply system theory of imaging systems
Implement tomographic reconstruction algorithms
Use Fourier, filtered back-projection and algebraic methods
Identify and correct image artefacts in CT
